channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [ZELIO] Zelio E Mobility Ltd Approves Strategic Expansion in South India and Appoints Secretarial and Internal Auditors
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Zelio E Mobility Ltd announced that its Board of Directors has approved the establishment of a warehouse and assembly facility at Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, as part of the Company’s strategic expansion in South India. The Board also approved entering into a Lease Agreement for the said facility and authorized the Directors of the Company to execute the lease agreement and other necessary documents on behalf of the Company. The Board further approved the appointment of M/s. Jagsir Singh & Associates, Company Secretaries, as Secretarial Auditor and M/s. T S A & Co., Chartered Accountants, as Internal Auditor for the Financial Year 2025-26.

  • Zelio E Mobility Ltd to establish a warehouse and assembly facility in Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu
  • The facility will be utilized for assembly of electric scooters, storage, logistics and allied business activities
  • The Board approved the appointment of M/s. Jagsir Singh & Associates, Company Secretaries, as Secretarial Auditor
  • M/s. T S A & Co., Chartered Accountants appointed as Internal Auditor for the Financial Year 2025-26

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Zelio E Mobility Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [ABCGAS] Onix Solar Energy Ltd Announces Allotment of 45,76,305 Equity Shares in Rights Issue
item.description:
Onix Solar Energy Ltd has announced the allotment of 45,76,305 fully paid-up equity shares of the Company of face value of Rs. 10 each for cash, at a price of Rs. 546.00 per rights equity share (including a premium of Rs. 536.00 per rights equity share) aggregating up to Rs. 250.00 Crores. The Rights Issue offer opened on Thursday, 26th February, 2026 and closed on Friday, 06th March, 2026. The allotment has resulted in an increase in the Company's paid-up equity share capital from Rs. 20,49,38,850/- divided into 2,04,93,885 Equity Shares of Rs.10/- each to Rs. 25,07,01,900/- divided into 2,50,70,190 Equity Shares of Rs.10/- each.

  • Onix Solar Energy Ltd has announced the allotment of 45,76,305 fully paid-up equity shares.
  • The Rights Issue offer was opened on Thursday, 26th February, 2026 and closed on Friday, 06th March, 2026.
  • The allotment has resulted in an increase in the Company's paid-up equity share capital.
  • The Rights Issue was priced at Rs. 546.00 per rights equity share with a premium of Rs. 536.00.
  • The total amount raised through the Rights Issue is Rs. 250.00 Crores.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ABC GAS (INTERNATIONAL) LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [CMSINFO] CMS Info Systems Ltd Completes 100% Acquisition of Securens Systems Private Limited
item.description:
🔥 Trending

CMS Info Systems Limited has successfully completed the acquisition of additional 25,639 Compulsorily Convertible Preference Shares of X100 each in Securens Systems Private Limited. This acquisition has increased the Company’s aggregate shareholding in Securens to 100% of its total share capital on a fully diluted basis, making Securens a wholly owned subsidiary of the Company. This strategic investment in Securens further strengthens CMS’ Vision Al capabilities with a broader client base and provides synergy potential to drive growth in a key emerging business line.

  • CMS Info Systems Ltd has completed the acquisition of 100% of the share capital of Securens Systems Private Limited.
  • Securens is now a wholly owned subsidiary of CMS Info Systems Ltd.
  • This acquisition strengthens CMS’ Vision Al capabilities and provides synergy potential to drive growth in a key emerging business line.
  • Securens is an early market entrant in AloT RMS sector and a respectable brand with deep expertise in intelligent surveillance, predictive analytics, and technology-enabled compliance for BFSI, retail, and other industries.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CMS Info Systems Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [MINDACORP] Minda Corporation Ltd and Turntide Technologies Form a Joint Venture for Advanced EV Solutions in India
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Minda Corporation Ltd, through its wholly owned subsidiary, Spark Minda Green Mobility Systems Private Limited, India, and Turntide Drives Limited, United Kingdom, have signed a Joint Venture Agreement for the development and manufacturing of advanced new generation motor controllers, axial flux motors, pumps for thermal applications, and other customized controllers tailored primarily for India’s growing EV segment. The joint venture will leverage the combined strengths of Minda Corp and Turntide to accelerate the development cycles and strengthen the local supplier ecosystem for electric vehicles.

  • Minda Corporation Ltd and Turntide Technologies have formed a joint venture for advanced EV solutions in India.
  • The joint venture will focus on the development and manufacturing of advanced new generation motor controllers, axial flux motors, pumps for thermal applications, and other customized controllers.
  • The joint venture aims to bring Turntide’s advanced global technology closer to the Indian market and deliver localized, premium products suited to domestic requirements.
  • The new venture aims to meet OEMs stringent performance and quality requirements while delivering cost advantages through local manufacturing and cutting-edge solutions.
  • The joint venture is subject to the necessary regulatory approvals.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Minda Corporation Ltd | Category: Joint Ventures

item.title: [PCBL] PCBL Chemical Ltd Seeks Debenture Holders' Approval for Financial Covenant Deferment and Ratification of Meeting Process
item.description:
PCBL Chemical Limited, formerly known as PCBL Limited, has requested the Debenture Trustee to convene a meeting of Debenture Holders on shorter notice to seek approvals for certain proposed amendments to the Debenture Trust Deed. The company aims to defer the testing of the financial covenant on 'Consolidated Gross Debt / EBITDA' for the financial year 2025-2026 and seek ratification for procedural matters. The rationale behind this proposal is to support and implement a planned growth and business expansion of the company.

  • PCBL Chemical Ltd seeks debenture holders' approval for deferring the testing of a financial covenant
  • The proposed amendment aims to support the company's planned growth and business expansion
  • The company is also seeking ratification for procedural matters
  • The meeting of debenture holders is to be convened on shorter notice on 13 March 2026
  • The decision follows the Fund Raising Committee of the Board of Directors' approval

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PCBL Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [PCBL] PCBL Chemical Ltd Seeks Debenture Holders' Approval for Financial Covenant Deferment and Ratification of Procedural Matters
item.description:
PCBL Chemical Ltd (formerly known as PCBL Limited) has requested the Debenture Trustee to convene a meeting of Debenture Holders on shorter notice for seeking approvals. The company aims to defer the testing of the financial covenant on 'Consolidated Gross Debt / EBITDA' for the financial year 2025-2026 and seek ratification/confirmation for procedural matters. The rationale behind this proposal is to support and implement a planned growth and business expansion of the company.

  • PCBL Chemical Ltd seeks debenture holders' approval for deferring financial covenant testing
  • The proposed deferment is aimed at supporting the company's planned growth and business expansion
  • The company also seeks ratification/confirmation for procedural matters
  • A meeting of debenture holders will be held on 13 March 2026
  • The proposal is in accordance with Clause 18.8 (Amendments) and Paragraph 16 of Part A of the DTD

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PCBL Ltd | Category: Deals

item.title: [ZELIO] Zelio E-Mobility to Establish Warehouse and Assembly Facility in Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu
item.description:
🔥 Trending

The Board of Directors of Zelio E-Mobility Ltd approved the establishment of a warehouse and assembly facility at Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, as part of the Company’s strategic expansion in South India. The facility will be utilized for assembly of electric scooters, storage, logistics and allied business activities with an operational setup commencing from April 2026 and commercial operations expected to commence from July 2026. The Board also approved the appointment of M/s. Jagsir Singh & Associates, Company Secretaries, as Secretarial Auditor and M/s. T S A & Co., Chartered Accountants (FRN: 020026C), as Internal Auditor for the Financial Year 2025-26.

  • Establishment of a warehouse and assembly facility in Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu
  • Strategic expansion in South India
  • Facility to be used for assembly of electric scooters, storage, logistics and allied business activities
  • Appointment of M/s. Jagsir Singh & Associates, Company Secretaries, as Secretarial Auditor
  • Appointment of M/s. T S A & Co., Chartered Accountants (FRN: 020026C), as Internal Auditor

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Zelio E Mobility Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [DCBBANK] DCB Bank Appoints Mr. Pushan Mahapatra as Additional and Non-Executive (Independent) Director
item.description:
DCB Bank Ltd has approved the appointment of Mr. Pushan Mahapatra as an Additional and Non-Executive (Independent) Director for a period of three years, subject to the approval of the Shareholders. The Bank will also recommend Mr. Mahapatra for the position of the Non-Executive Part Time Chairman of the Bank and apply to the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) for its approval. Mr. Mahapatra is a career banker with an experience of over 40 years, having successfully managed senior leadership positions across Retail & Corporate Banking, Technology, Compliance & Audit. He was posted at SBI’s Hong Kong Branch for over 4 years as Vice President (Systems & Internal Audit) and headed SBI General Insurance Co. Ltd. as the MD&CEO for nearly 5 years. He is currently serving as a Non-Executive Director with Zurich Kotak General Insurance Co. (India) Ltd and as an Independent Director on the Board of Angel One Trustee Limited.

  • DCB Bank approves appointment of Mr. Pushan Mahapatra as Additional and Non-Executive (Independent) Director
  • Mr. Mahapatra recommended for the position of Non-Executive Part Time Chairman of the Bank
  • Mr. Mahapatra has over 40 years of banking experience
  • He has held senior leadership positions in Retail & Corporate Banking, Technology, Compliance & Audit
  • He was MD&CEO of SBI General Insurance Co. Ltd for nearly 5 years

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DCB Bank Limited | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ABCGAS] Onix Solar Energy Ltd's Rights Issue Committee Approves Equity Shares Allotment of Rs. 250.00 Crores
item.description:
Onix Solar Energy Ltd, formerly ABC GAS (INTERNATIONAL) Limited, announced a Rights Issue of up to 45,76,305 fully paid-up equity shares at a price of Rs. 546.00 per rights equity share, including a premium of Rs. 536.00 per rights equity share. The Rights Issue offer opened on 26th February 2026 and closed on 6th March 2026. After the finalization of the basis of allotment, the Rights Issue Committee approved the allotment of 45,76,305 fully paid-up Equity Shares at an issue price of Rs. 546/- per Equity Share. Consequently, the paid-up equity share capital of the Company has increased from Rs. 20,49,38,850/- divided into 2,04,93,885 Equity Shares to Rs. 25,07,01,900/- divided into 2,50,70,190 Equity Shares.

  • Onix Solar Energy Ltd announced a Rights Issue of up to 45,76,305 fully paid-up equity shares.
  • The Rights Issue offer opened on 26th February 2026 and closed on 6th March 2026.
  • The Rights Issue Committee approved the allotment of 45,76,305 fully paid-up Equity Shares.
  • The paid-up equity share capital of the Company has increased from Rs. 20,49,38,850/- to Rs. 25,07,01,900/-.
  • The Rights Issue was approved by BSE Limited, being the Designated Stock Exchange for the Issue.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ABC GAS (INTERNATIONAL) LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [JAGSNPHARM] Jagsonpal Pharmaceuticals Ltd. Announces Board Meeting to Consider Buyback of Equity Shares
item.description:
Jagsonpal Pharmaceuticals Ltd. has informed the BSE that a Board Meeting is scheduled on 12th March 2026. The agenda of the meeting includes considering and approving a proposal for a Buyback of fully paid-up equity shares of the company. The buyback is in accordance with the applicable provisions of the Companies Act, 2013, SEBI (Buyback of Securities) Regulations, 2018, and other applicable laws.

  • Jagsonpal Pharmaceuticals Ltd. scheduled a Board Meeting on 12th March 2026
  • The agenda includes a proposal for a Buyback of fully paid-up equity shares
  • The buyback is in accordance with the Companies Act, 2013, SEBI (Buyback of Securities) Regulations, 2018, and other applicable laws

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JAGSONPAL PHARMACEUTICALS LTD. | Category: Buyback
